wsgReference.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact

benchmarkReference.name: Sustainable Web Design Digital Carbon Ratings

wsgReference.title: Give third parties the same priority as first parties during assessment
Validate form errors and account for tooling requirements
Structure metadata for machine readability
Ensure layouts work for different devices and requirements
Ensure that your code is secure
Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
Include expected and beneficial files
Reduce data transfer with compression
Use the most efficient solution for your service
Optimize caching and support offline access
Use the latest stable language version

sharedRecommendations.title: Add robots.txt at site origin
sharedRecommendations.detail: robots.txt is missing for all sampled pages on https://www.nh.gov.

sharedRecommendations.title: Add sitemap.xml at site origin
sharedRecommendations.detail: sitemap.xml is missing for all sampled pages on https://www.nh.gov.

sharedRecommendations.title: Publish .well-known/security.txt
sharedRecommendations.detail: .well-known/security.txt is missing for all sampled pages on https://www.nh.gov.

sharedRecommendations.title: Enable Strict-Transport-Security site-wide
sharedRecommendations.detail: HSTS is missing across all sampled HTTPS pages on https://www.nh.gov.

sharedRecommendations.title: Introduce service worker support
sharedRecommendations.detail: No sampled pages on https://www.nh.gov indicate service worker support for offline resilience.

sharedRecommendations.title: Support offline fallback behavior
sharedRecommendations.detail: Offline page behavior was not detected across sampled pages on https://www.nh.gov.

sharedRecommendations.title: Fix recurring optimization bloat at shared layer
sharedRecommendations.detail: Remove unused JavaScript recurs across 36 pages on https://www.nh.gov (est. 10.48 MB aggregate savings).

sharedRecommendations.title: Prioritize recurring compression fixes
sharedRecommendations.detail: Minify JavaScript before transfer recurs across 36 pages on https://www.nh.gov (est. 4.25 MB aggregate savings).

sharedRecommendations.title: Prioritize recurring offline/caching improvements
sharedRecommendations.detail: Add service worker support is needed across 55 pages on https://www.nh.gov.

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 10.2 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
findings.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

wsg.title: Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
wsg.subheading: Use libraries and frameworks only where necessary, when plain code or smaller packages are inappropriate for the use case, and they are kept up to date.

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats

## Improve Eliminate render-blocking resources

- Current value: Est savings of 2,170 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact

Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information

### Why this matters
A large DOM will increase memory usage, cause longer [style calculations](https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/performance/rendering/reduce-the-scope-and-complexity-of-style-calculations), and produce costly [layout reflows](https://developers.google.com/speed/articles/reflow). [Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

observed.title: History | NH.gov
observed.description: Did you know New Hampshire was first named North Virginia, and it was once under the jurisdiction of Massachusetts?
observed.ogDescription: Early historians record that in 1623, under the authority of an English land-grant, Captain John Mason, in conjunction with several others, sent David Thomson, a Scotsman, and Edward and Thomas Hilton, fish-merchants of London, with a number of other people in two divisions to establish a fishing colony in what is now New Hampshire, at the mouth of the Piscataqua River.

recommendations.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
recommendations.detail: Inline critical assets and defer non-critical scripts/styles for faster rendering. Estimated render unblocking: 1421 ms.

recommendations.title: Remove unused CSS
recommendations.detail: Trim unused selectors and split CSS so only needed styles are shipped. Estimated byte savings: 58.92 KB.

recommendations.title: Serve images in next-gen formats
recommendations.detail: Convert high-byte images to more efficient formats such as AVIF or WebP. Estimated byte savings: 25.53 KB.

recommendations.title: Right-size images for viewport
recommendations.detail: Avoid sending larger images than the rendered size needs. Estimated byte savings: 21.03 KB.

[Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

- Lighthouse audit: uses-text-compression
- WSG guideline: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information

### Why this matters
Text-based resources should be served with compression (gzip, deflate or brotli) to minimize total network bytes. [Learn more about text compression](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-text-compression/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

[Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

- Lighthouse audit: uses-text-compression
- WSG guideline: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information

### Why this matters
Text-based resources should be served with compression (gzip, deflate or brotli) to minimize total network bytes. [Learn more about text compression](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-text-compression/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

[Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 9.1 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 7.2 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
findings.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

wsg.title: Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
wsg.subheading: Use libraries and frameworks only where necessary, when plain code or smaller packages are inappropriate for the use case, and they are kept up to date.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Reduce unused JavaScript

- Lighthouse audit: unused-javascript
- Current value: Est savings of 341 KiB
- WSG guideline: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance

Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

### Definition of done

- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused CSS

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats
findings.description: Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

wsg.title: Optimize media to reduce resource use
wsg.subheading: Ensure all media - including audio, video, animation, images, and other novel formats, when deemed necessary in the design, are optimized, correctly sized and formatted, use lazy loading where appropriate, with a usage policy in place.

findings.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
findings.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

wsg.title: Use the most efficient solution for your service
wsg.subheading: Identify the project requirements, use the most efficient approach, aim for static over dynamic where possible, and consider the impact of extensions and components.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Eliminate render-blocking resources

- Lighthouse audit: render-blocking-resources
- Current value: Est savings of 3,570 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

observed.title: State Amphibian | NH.gov
observed.ogDescription: Spotted Newt The spotted newt, Notophthalmus viridescens, is hereby designated as the official state amphibian of New Hampshire. The spotted newt was designated the state amphibian in 1985 after a two year effort by high school students. Newts are very common to the region. The Union Leader newspaper (April 25, 1985, p48) lists the newts as the "perfect symbol for ensuring ecology in New Hampshire as they exist predominantly in the rain and runoff sodden areas heavily affected by acid rain." Source: New Hampshire Revised Statutes Annotated (RSA) 3:16

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 6.5 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
findings.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

wsg.title: Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
wsg.subheading: Use libraries and frameworks only where necessary, when plain code or smaller packages are inappropriate for the use case, and they are kept up to date.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Reduce unused JavaScript

- Lighthouse audit: unused-javascript
- Current value: Est savings of 249 KiB
- WSG guideline: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-dependencies-appropriately-and-ensure-maintenance

### Why this matters
Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused CSS
findings.description: Reduce unused rules from stylesheets and defer CSS not used for above-the-fold content to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused CSS](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-css-rules/).

findings.issueTemplate:

- Current value: Est savings of 59 KiB
- WSG guideline: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information

### Why this matters
Reduce unused rules from stylesheets and defer CSS not used for above-the-fold content to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused CSS](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-css-rules/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
findings.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

wsg.title: Use the most efficient solution for your service
wsg.subheading: Identify the project requirements, use the most efficient approach, aim for static over dynamic where possible, and consider the impact of extensions and components.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Eliminate render-blocking resources

- Lighthouse audit: render-blocking-resources
- Current value: Est savings of 1,500 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats
findings.description: Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

wsg.title: Optimize media to reduce resource use
wsg.subheading: Ensure all media - including audio, video, animation, images, and other novel formats, when deemed necessary in the design, are optimized, correctly sized and formatted, use lazy loading where appropriate, with a usage policy in place.

findings.issueTemplate:

Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 10.3 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 10.6 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
findings.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

wsg.title: Use the most efficient solution for your service
wsg.subheading: Identify the project requirements, use the most efficient approach, aim for static over dynamic where possible, and consider the impact of extensions and components.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Eliminate render-blocking resources

- Lighthouse audit: render-blocking-resources
- Current value: Est savings of 3,730 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats
findings.description: Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

wsg.title: Optimize media to reduce resource use
wsg.subheading: Ensure all media - including audio, video, animation, images, and other novel formats, when deemed necessary in the design, are optimized, correctly sized and formatted, use lazy loading where appropriate, with a usage policy in place.

findings.title: Avoid an excessive DOM size
findings.description: A large DOM will increase memory usage, cause longer [style calculations](https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/performance/rendering/reduce-the-scope-and-complexity-of-style-calculations), and produce costly [layout reflows](https://developers.google.com/speed/articles/reflow). [Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

wsg.title: Remove unnecessary or redundant information
wsg.subheading: Remove redundant characters from code to reduce the amount of data being stored and transferred to devices.

findings.issueTemplate:

- WSG guideline: 2 Remove unnecessary or redundant information
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#remove-unnecessary-or-redundant-information

### Why this matters
A large DOM will increase memory usage, cause longer [style calculations](https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/performance/rendering/reduce-the-scope-and-complexity-of-style-calculations), and produce costly [layout reflows](https://developers.google.com/speed/articles/reflow). [Learn how to avoid an excessive DOM size](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/dom-size/).

### Definition of done

- [ ] Changes documented in release notes

observed.title: Accessibility Policy | NH.gov
observed.description: New Hampshire State Government is committed to making all electronic resources accessible to all users. A key component of the state's e-Government Strategy and Architecture is "universal access". This requires all agencies to provide universally accessible websites that enable persons with disabilities to access them.
observed.ogDescription: Adoption of the State of New Hampshire's Web Accessibility Policy and Standards Establishment of a monitoring and testing program to assist agencies in the development and maintenance of accessible websites.

Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 9.0 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
findings.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

wsg.title: Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance
wsg.subheading: Use libraries and frameworks only where necessary, when plain code or smaller packages are inappropriate for the use case, and they are kept up to date.

findings.issueTemplate:

- Lighthouse audit: unused-javascript
- Current value: Est savings of 249 KiB
- WSG guideline: 16 Use dependencies appropriately and ensure maintenance

Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused CSS
findings.description: Reduce unused rules from stylesheets and defer CSS not used for above-the-fold content to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused CSS](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-css-rules/).

wsg.title: Remove unnecessary or redundant information

Reduce unused rules from stylesheets and defer CSS not used for above-the-fold content to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused CSS](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-css-rules/).

- [ ] Changes documented in release notes

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats
findings.description: Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

wsg.title: Optimize media to reduce resource use
wsg.subheading: Ensure all media - including audio, video, animation, images, and other novel formats, when deemed necessary in the design, are optimized, correctly sized and formatted, use lazy loading where appropriate, with a usage policy in place.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Serve images in next-gen formats

- Lighthouse audit: modern-image-formats
- Current value: Est savings of 37 KiB
- WSG guideline: 11 Optimize media to reduce resource use
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#optimize-media-to-reduce-resource-use

### Why this matters
Image formats like WebP and AVIF often provide better compression than PNG or JPEG, which means faster downloads and less data consumption. [Learn more about modern image formats](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/uses-webp-images/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
findings.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

wsg.title: Use the most efficient solution for your service
wsg.subheading: Identify the project requirements, use the most efficient approach, aim for static over dynamic where possible, and consider the impact of extensions and components.

findings.issueTemplate:

- Current value: Est savings of 510 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

wsg.title: Set goals based on performance and energy impact
wsg.subheading: Account for the difference in energy intensity that different types of content may have on a project and set goals based on what you would like to achieve.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Largest Contentful Paint

- Lighthouse audit: largest-contentful-paint
- Current value: 10.0 s
- WSG guideline: 1 Set goals based on performance and energy impact
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#set-goals-based-on-performance-and-energy-impact

### Why this matters
Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted. [Learn more about the Largest Contentful Paint metric](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/lighthouse-largest-contentful-paint/)

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement

findings.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
findings.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required to decrease bytes consumed by network activity. [Learn how to reduce unused JavaScript](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/unused-javascript/).

wsg.subheading: Use libraries and frameworks only where necessary, when plain code or smaller packages are inappropriate for the use case, and they are kept up to date.

findings.issueTemplate:

findings.title: Serve images in next-gen formats

findings.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
findings.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

wsg.title: Use the most efficient solution for your service
wsg.subheading: Identify the project requirements, use the most efficient approach, aim for static over dynamic where possible, and consider the impact of extensions and components.

findings.issueTemplate:
## Improve Eliminate render-blocking resources

- Lighthouse audit: render-blocking-resources
- Current value: Est savings of 3,590 ms
- WSG guideline: 18 Use the most efficient solution for your service
- WSG link: https://www.w3.org/TR/web-sustainability-guidelines/#use-the-most-efficient-solution-for-your-service

### Why this matters
Resources are blocking the first paint of your page. Consider delivering critical JS/CSS inline and deferring all non-critical JS/styles. [Learn how to eliminate render-blocking resources](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/performance/render-blocking-resources/).

### Definition of done
- [ ] Metric improves in Lighthouse on key templates
- [ ] Changes documented in release notes
- [ ] Re-scan confirms improvement
